facts: IIT Bhilai (Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai) is located at Kutelabhata, Bhilai, Chhattisgarh.
Languages spoken: All languages in college, Hindi and local language in the state.
Climate: High temperatures, low rain, dry weather.
Nearest railway and bus stations are Durg and Raipur.
Nearest airport is Raipur.
Modes of transport include car, bus, bike, train, and flight.
IIT Bhilai has two messes: Shree Sai and Galav Foods.
IIT Bhilai has 8 paid laundry machines.
Election positions at IIT Bhilai: President, Gen-Sec, Cult, and Sci-Tech.
Sports available at IIT Bhilai: Volleyball, Athletics, Football, Cricket, Basketball, Chess, and Table Tennis.
IIT Bhilai has two canteens.
Canteen timings: one operates 11AM to 3AM, the other 5PM to 11PM.
One gym available for all students (boys and girls).
Ragging fine: Rs 25,000 to Rs 1 Lakh plus suspension or expulsion.
Smoking and alcohol are prohibited on campus.
Hostel and dining misconduct attract fines.
Academic integrity violations carry penalties.
Late submission of assignments attracts penalties.
Caution money is Rs 9,000 (refundable).
Insurance costs Rs 1,000 per year.
IIT Bhilai has a 24/7 medical facility with 2 ambulances.

hotels: Super Hotel O Bhilai Near IIT

facts: All languages are spoken in the college. Hindi and local language are spoken in the state.
High temperatures, low rain, and dry weather around IIT Bhilai.
